# N4/N5 cross-project target (REAL vault-root-relative)

The real cross-project target reached via the `repos/`-prefix class. N4 points
at a heading that is absent here (dangling → C2); N5 points at the Present
heading below (resolves → 0 C2), proving the resolver checks the REAL
vault-root file, NOT N5's local shadow. No §-pointer appears in this prose.
